changelog: Inline strips above the chat composer are now fully decoupled. Order topвЖТbottom: **рЯУЛ Plan вЖТ вЦґ Next вЖТ рЯФБ Repeat**. Plan and Next are paste-only stagers; only Repeat submits or loops.
Renamed the loop button label `вЦґ Start` вЖТ `рЯФБ Repeat` across `next-inline-ui.ts`, `repeat-loop-ui.ts`, `task-next-ui.ts` (comment), and `plan-task-ui.ts` (tooltip).

**Next strip rewritten**: dropped the auto-submit loop runner (steps/delay/action button). It is now a preset row `{1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 8}` that resolves the `next-${N}-steps` prompt variant (fallback: legacy `next-tasks`) and appends to chat with toast `рЯУЭ Next N staged вАФ press Enter to send`. Never submits, never loops.
`INLINE_AUTOCHAIN_DISABLED` module constant guarding the decoupling invariant; `tryMountInline` refuses to mount if flipped.
`RepeatLoop.start` log line at `repeat-loop-ui.ts:349` (`source=repeat-strip N=вА¶ chars=вА¶`) proving Repeat is the sole executor.

Version pins moved 4.5.0 вЖТ 4.6.0 across `version.json`, `manifest.json`, `src/shared/constants.ts`, all `standalone-scripts/**/instruction.ts`, `shared-state.ts`, `payment-banner-hider/src/index.ts`, and the prompts bundle metadata.
